name: Apache Iggy GTM - Bangalore Adoption Map
description: Geographic visualization of Apache Iggy go-to-market strategy for India's largest engineering hub. Each point represents a target segment, community venue, or strategic location.

properties.name: Electronic City - GCC Cluster
properties.iggy_relevance: Kafka cost optimization, multi-service event-driven architecture
properties.pain_point: ZooKeeper ops overhead, managed Kafka cloud spend

properties.name: Whitefield - ITPL / Export Hub
properties.example_companies: Atlassian, SAP Labs, Tesco, GE Digital
properties.pain_point: Tail latency P99 spikes from JVM GC in Kafka
properties.gtm_motion: Community content (Tedious Arch podcast) + discovery calls

properties.name: Outer Ring Road - Koramangala to Bellandur
properties.iggy_relevance: Payment event processing, order streams, real-time leaderboards
properties.pain_point: Latency is revenue in fintech - Kafka P9999 above 50ms under load

properties.name: HSR Layout - Startup Corridor
properties.example_companies: Early-stage Rust startups, solo builders, OSS contributors
properties.iggy_relevance: Only native Rust streaming platform - zero JVM dependencies
properties.pain_point: No Rust-idiomatic persistent streaming option in the ecosystem
properties.gtm_motion: Rust India meetup talks, crates.io presence, awesome-rust listing

properties.name: MG Road - Fintech HQ Cluster
properties.iggy_relevance: Trading signal processing, millions of financial events/day
properties.pain_point: GC pauses = missed trades; need sub-millisecond确定性

properties.name: Manyata Tech Park - Nagawara
properties.example_companies: Target India, Cognizant, IBM, Microsoft R&D
properties.iggy_relevance: Platform engineering teams evaluating Kafka alternatives
properties.pain_point: Platform engineers feel Kafka operational cost directly
properties.gtm_motion: Free Iggy Architecture Review sessions (2-hour consultation)

properties.name: Bagmane Tech Park - C V Raman Nagar
properties.iggy_relevance: Gaming backends (real-time leaderboards), ride-hailing event streams
properties.pain_point: Kafka overkill for single-binary Rust game server architecture
properties.gtm_motion: Custom demo showing Iggy replacing Kafka for game state streaming

properties.name: JUSPAY HQ - Residency Road
properties.segment: Community Venue - Rust India Meetup Host
properties.context: Rust India Bangalore Meetup (2700 members) hosted here Feb 2026
properties.gtm_action: Submit Iggy talk: 'Real-Time Streaming in Pure Rust'
properties.activation: Demo Parseltongue using Iggy as event bus - visceral Rust credibility

properties.name: Open Source India 2026 - NIMHANS
properties.gtm_action: Submit session on Iggy + benchmark dashboard demo
properties.activation: Target: engineering leaders from GCCs across India, not just BLR

properties.name: JOSH Event Venue - Bangalore
properties.context: Just an Open Source Hub - April 2026 Bangalore events
properties.gtm_action: Submit talk + demo booth if available
properties.activation: OSS-native audience, high overlap with Rust-curious devs

properties.name: Sarjapur Road - Wipro / Intel Corridor
properties.iggy_relevance: IoT telemetry, single-binary deployment on constrained devices
properties.pain_point: Kafka cluster is absurd for a 4-CPU ARM device or factory floor
properties.gtm_motion: 'Replace Mosquitto + DB with Iggy on Raspberry Pi' tutorial

properties.name: Bangalore GTM Strategy - Phase 1 Radius
properties.context: Week 1-2: Foundation - Map 100 target orgs, join communities
properties.gtm_action: LinkedIn posts 3x/week, Discord first-responder for IST timezone

properties.name: AI/Agentic Infrastructure Play
properties.segment: Emerging Segment - Nurture via Thought Leadership
properties.context: 58% of India GCCs investing in agentic AI
properties.iggy_relevance: Native MCP server for AI-agent-aware streaming
properties.pain_point: Multi-agent coordination needs reliable low-latency channels with replay
properties.gtm_motion: 'Apache Iggy as the Event Bus for Multi-Agent Systems' blog + GitHub repo
properties.activation: Parseltongue project is the authentic demo: LLM agent using Iggy for inter-agent communication
